title: Sunglasses Texture Pack
description: Turns all helmets into different varieties of Sunglasses, leather ones can be dyed!
body:
# The Sunglasses Texture Pack

## How it works

All of the different helmets - Leather, Chainmail, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite and Turtle - are now sunglasses! They come in different varieties, such as classic, wrap, avaitors (kinda) and even Sledgebro from Paper Mario:
![SLEDGEBRO SHADES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aecb750a55907b42c18f698074219fce62fc962.webp)

## What about color?

Well, first of all its actually spelt "colour" 🤓...
But yeah, if you dye leather sunglasses, they DO change colour, as well as all the other sunglasses having their respective materials' colour.

## Credits

It was all me. My Youtube Channel is @TomatoFacex1.
